mcq.question: What is primary storage?
mcq.correct: Memory directly accessed by the CPU
wrong: Storage used for long-term data storage
Storage accessed over the internet
Storage used to keep backup copies of files

mcq.question: Which of these is an example of primary storage?
wrong: Hard drive
USB stick
DVD

mcq.question: What does volatile mean?
mcq.correct: Loses data when power is off
wrong: Data is stored permanently
Data can be accessed more quickly
Data is stored in secondary storage

mcq.question: What is the main role of ROM?
wrong: Store files for long-term use
Hold programs while they are running
Process graphical data for display

mcq.question: Why is RAM needed?
mcq.correct: To store running programs and data
wrong: To store files permanently
To manage communication between devices
To control input devices

mcq.question: What is virtual memory?
mcq.correct: Secondary storage used as an extension of RAM
wrong: A type of permanent read-only memory
A system used to connect computers together
A method used to display images on screen

mcq.question: Why is virtual memory slower?
wrong: It uses less data than RAM
It is processed by input devices
It is stored in read-only memory
